creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #17)

Ok, but meson options have:

option(
  'llvm',
  type : 'feature',
  deprecated: {'true': 'enabled', 'false': 'disabled'},
  description : 'Build with LLVM support.'
)

option(
  'shared-llvm',
  type : 'feature',
  deprecated: {'true': 'enabled', 'false': 'disabled'},
  description : 'Whether to link LLVM shared or statically.'
)

option(
  'draw-use-llvm',
  type : 'boolean',
  value : true,
  description : 'Whether to use LLVM for the Gallium draw module, if LLVM ' +
                'is included.'
)

And maybe there is a possibility to build it without llvm dep for systems/arches that doesn't need it?
